0.text: Three paravertebral and centrally located lesions in the posterior and lateral segment of the right lower lobe, measuring 18 mm and 10 mm

1.text: Anterior segment lesion in the right upper lobe posteriorly in the paramediastinal area

2.text: Apical fibrotic recessions and calcific foci in the upper lobe of the right lung

3.text: Changes secondary to TB in the upper lobe of the right lung
